stories.name: project-scaffold
stories.title: Project Scaffold: Next.js + TypeScript + Chakra UI + Routing Skeleton
stories.description: Initialize a new Next.js (Pages Router) project with TypeScript and Chakra UI. Create all route files with placeholder pages: /, /topics, /topic/[slug], /leaderboard, /study-times, /settings. Set up shared layout with navigation. Verify static export (`next export`) works. Set up Playwright for E2E tests.

includes: Next.js Pages Router setup with TypeScript
Playwright config and one smoke test
TypeScript types file (src/types/index.ts) with all spec types

stories.notes: Use Next.js 14 with Pages Router for simplest static export. Chakra UI v2. Initialize with `npx create-next-app` or manual setup. All type definitions from spec section 4.3 go into src/types/index.ts.

stories.name: content-ingestion
stories.title: Content Ingestion: JSON Topics + Topic List/Selection UI
stories.description: Create at least 3 bundled topic JSON files in /public/content/ (or src/content/) covering all 3 quiz types. Implement content loading utilities that normalize JSON into the Topic TypeScript type. Build the /topics page showing all topics with title, description, tags. Implement topic selection (select/deselect) with localStorage persistence (lp_selectedTopics_v1). Show 'My Topics' section. Handle empty state (no topics selected).

includes: 3+ topic JSON files with varied content
/topics page with full/my tabs or sections
Empty state for 'My Topics' with CTA

test_fixtures: 3 sample topic JSON files with all quiz types represented
stories.notes: Content JSON schema must match Topic type exactly. Include topics about diverse subjects. Each topic must have at least one single, one multi, one flashcard question, and a study plan with 2+ steps.

stories.name: quiz-engine
stories.title: Topic Page Tabs + Quiz Engine (A/B/C) + Scoring + Persistence
stories.description: Build the /topic/[slug] page with Quiz, Notes, Study Plan tabs. Implement the full quiz engine: display questions by type (single, multi, flashcard), handle answer recording, scoring logic (+1/-1 floored at 0 for multi), prev/next navigation, progress indicator, completion summary with retry. Persist answers and points to lp_progress_v1 in localStorage.

includes: QuestionCard components for each type (Single, Multi, Flashcard)
Topic header with stats (points, plan progress)

stories.notes: Notes and Study Plan tabs show placeholder content in this story. Scoring must be unit tested. Flashcard flip animation is optional but recommended.

stories.name: notes-editor
stories.title: Notes Editor + Persistence
stories.description: Implement the Notes tab with a rich text editor (TipTap recommended). Support bold, italic, lists, headings, links. Autosave with debounce (500ms) to lp_progress_v1[slug].notesHtml. Show autosave indicator. Notes persist after refresh. Notes are per-topic.

includes: Toolbar with bold, italic, ul, ol, h1/h2, link controls

stories.notes: TipTap v2 is recommended. Use @tiptap/react, @tiptap/starter-kit. Ensure SSR compatibility with Next.js (dynamic import with ssr:false if needed).

stories.name: study-plan
stories.title: Study Plan Rendering + Task Completion Persistence
stories.description: Implement the Study Plan tab. Render ordered steps from topic content. Each step shows title, optional description, and a task checklist. Tasks can be marked complete. Show completed/total progress per step. Persist completedTaskIds to lp_progress_v1[slug].completedTaskIds. Completion survives refresh.

includes: Persistence via useTopicProgress hook (extend from story 03)
Empty state for topics with no study plan
excludes: Quiz question references rendered inline (show task title only)

stories.notes: Task types: quiz, notes, flashcards, custom — all rendered as checkable items with their title. No need to deep-link to quiz questions from study plan in this story.

stories.name: study-time-tracking
stories.title: Study Time Tracking + Shared Study Times Page
stories.description: Add Start/Stop session controls to the topic page header. On start, record activeSession in lp_studyTimes_v1. On stop, append completed session. On refresh during active session, prompt user to continue or stop. Build /study-times page showing today's time, this week's time, and recent sessions list (start, end, duration, topic).

includes: StudyTimer component (Start/Stop button + elapsed time display)
Active session recovery on refresh (modal or banner prompt)
excludes: Auto-start on page entry (manual start/stop per spec)

stories.notes: Duration calculation: endedAt - startedAt in ms. Group sessions by day for today/week totals. Show topic name in session list.

stories.name: leaderboard
stories.title: Leaderboard Page (User-only Aggregation)
stories.description: Build the /leaderboard page. Aggregate total quiz points across all selected topics from lp_progress_v1. Show user's total points, rank as 'You (1/1)', and optional streak. Design implies group context without mentioning fake users. No other users displayed.

includes: Total points aggregation across selected topics
Optional: streak calculation (days with any study activity)
Empty state (no selected topics or no quiz answers yet)

stories.notes: Points are aggregated from lp_progress_v1.byTopicSlug[slug].quizPoints for all selected topics. The framing should feel like a real leaderboard — 'Your Score' as the only entry is fine.

stories.name: mood-theming-settings-polish
stories.title: Mood Theming + Settings + Reset + Empty/Error States Polish
stories.description: Implement calm/playful mood theming via Chakra UI theme extension. Build /settings page with mood toggle and 'Reset all data' action. Apply theme tokens throughout the app. Polish all empty/error states (no topics selected, missing quiz, localStorage unavailable). Ensure responsive layout on 375px mobile and keyboard navigation works throughout.

includes: Chakra UI theme extension with calm and playful variants
lp_* localStorage keys cleared on reset
localStorage unavailable detection and warning banner
Polish: all empty states have message + CTA

stories.notes: Calm theme: muted blues/greens, minimal animations. Playful theme: warmer colors (oranges/purples), slightly more rounded corners, subtle bounce animations. Both must pass WCAG AA contrast.

dependency_notes: Stories build sequentially on prior work. Story 01 establishes the scaffold all others extend. Story 02 creates the content and storage layer used by 03-08. Stories 03-08 each add a distinct feature layer. No cross-story mocks required since each story builds on prior completed work.
mock_resolution_plan: No temporary mocks needed. Stories are sequenced so each one can rely on the real implementations from previous stories.
